goal: Add an export contract for BPK-060 memory cache invalidation audit trails, producing an export manifest without writing files, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes.
scope_out: Do not write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Audit trails can be described as export manifests without writing files.
Ready BPK-060 trail and export refs are required.
assumptions: Actual export persistence would be a later task.
dod: Ready, missing export ref, and blocked audit trail cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: File writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-060 built an in-memory audit trail for cache invalidation evidence.
